scripts.dev: bun run dev:server & bun run dev:web
scripts.check:types: bun run --filter @chatroom/shared check:types && bun run --filter @chatroom/server check:types && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector check:types && bun run --filter @chatroom/web check:types
scripts.check:test: bun run --filter @chatroom/shared check:test && bun run --filter @chatroom/server check:test && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector check:test && bun run --filter @chatroom/web check:test
scripts.check:coverage: bun run --filter @chatroom/shared check:coverage && bun run --filter @chatroom/server check:coverage && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector check:coverage && bun run --filter @chatroom/web check:coverage
scripts.check:lint: bun run --filter @chatroom/shared check:lint && bun run --filter @chatroom/server check:lint && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector check:lint && bun run --filter @chatroom/web check:lint
scripts.check:format: bun run --filter @chatroom/shared check:format && bun run --filter @chatroom/server check:format && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector check:format && bun run --filter @chatroom/web check:format
scripts.check:all: bun run check:types && bun run check:test && bun run check:coverage && bun run check:lint && bun run check:format
